description_long: This is a vintage-style red vending machine with a rectangular, upright form and rounded edges. The front features a large white display panel with Cyrillic text, two small rectangular windows, and a central product retrieval slot with a metallic trim. The body is predominantly red with metallic horizontal bands and a few vent slits visible on one side. The machine appears to be constructed mainly from metal, with some plastic or glass components for the display and windows. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements aside from the signage. Its size and robust build suggest it is intended for outdoor or public urban environments.
description: A vintage red vending machine with a white display panel, metallic trim, and a central retrieval slot, featuring Cyrillic signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display panel with Cyrillic text, two small windows, and a central product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain red surface with vent slits near the bottom and no interactive features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless, solid red back panel with no visible openings or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, with a plain red surface and no visible vents or features.
attribute_display_panel: A large, rectangular white display panel is located at the top front of the machine, bordered by metallic trim, with printed Cyrillic text in red and gray.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot is visible on the front, below the display panel and above the product retrieval slot.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Two small, black, rectangular buttons are present on the front, symmetrically placed below the display panel.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular slot with metallic trim is centrally located on the front, below the buttons and coin slot.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The display panel at the top front features Cyrillic text in red and gray, serving as both branding and product information.
